title: Verilator does not follow the genblk naming scheme presented in the LRM

features.name: implicit genblk naming for if generate
features.description: Code should include an if generate construct with implicit genblk naming where genblk1 is the default first generate block name

features.name: genblk naming conflict with declared identifier
features.description: Code should include a generate block with implicit naming that conflicts with an already-declared identifier name

features.name: for generate with explicit block name and nested genblk
features.description: Code should include a for generate construct with explicit block name containing a nested if generate with implicit genblk naming

features.name: sequential genblk numbering across nested generates
features.description: Code should include multiple nested generate constructs with sequential genblk numbering following LRM rules

features.name: genblk with bracket index for for-loops
features.description: Code should include a for generate loop where genblk names appear with bracket indices for loop instances
